notes: CRD/API compatibility only. Runtime controller reconciliation not claimed for v1.34.
Control-plane instability: containerd sandbox_image mismatch (pause:3.8 vs pause:3.10.1).
kind and k3d/K3s not validated on v1.34.
v1.34 validation is limited to kubeadm CRD/API compatibility. For runtime-controller evidence see v1.36.
This does not imply validation on EKS, GKE, AKS, OpenShift, Rancher, all CNIs, all storage providers, or all Kubernetes 1.34 environments.
